name: elevare
description: Collaborative learning platform with AI-powered summarization

scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:summarization
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:summarization
scripts.install:summarization: cd summarization-service && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.health: curl -s http://localhost:8001/health && curl -s http://localhost:3001/health && curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/health
